tasks.title: Remove AI Tutor tab from navigation in src/services/ChatContext.ts
tasks.description: Modify src/services/ChatContext.ts to remove the 'tutor' page from the PAGE_LABELS constant and any references to 'tutor' in the pathToPage function and related navigation logic, effectively removing the AI Tutor tab from the app navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: The 'tutor' page label is removed from PAGE_LABELS
The pathToPage function no longer returns 'tutor' for any path
No references to 'tutor' page remain in navigation logic
tasks.expectedResult: AI Tutor tab is removed from the app navigation and cannot be accessed via navigation routes

outputPlan.description: Remove 'tutor' page from PAGE_LABELS and pathToPage function

metadata.inputContext: Current navigation pages and routing logic including AI Tutor tab
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Removes AI Tutor tab from navigation to prepare for chat popup input integration

tasks.title: Add AI Tutor chat popup input component in src/components/aiTutor/ChatPopup.tsx
tasks.description: Modify src/components/aiTutor/ChatPopup.tsx to add a chat input field at the bottom of the popup that allows users to type messages and submit them. Implement state management for the input, handle submit events to send messages, and update the chat message list accordingly. Ensure the chat popup UI includes the input box with placeholder text and a submit button or enter key submission.
acceptanceCriteria: Chat popup includes a visible input field for user messages
User can type and submit messages via enter key or submit button
Submitted messages appear in the chat message list
No regressions in existing chat popup functionality
tasks.expectedResult: AI Tutor chat popup has a functional input field for user chat messages

outputPlan.description: Add chat input field and submit handler to ChatPopup component

metadata.inputContext: Existing ChatPopup component without input field
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Adds user input capability to AI Tutor chat popup for interactive chat

tasks.title: Remove AI Tutor tab references from UI components and routes
tasks.description: Search and remove any UI components, route definitions, or menu items that reference the AI Tutor tab or page, including any links or buttons that navigate to the AI Tutor tab. This includes removing or commenting out any route entries in routing configuration files and menu components that show the AI Tutor tab.
acceptanceCriteria: No UI elements or routes link to the AI Tutor tab
No broken links or navigation errors related to AI Tutor tab
App navigation reflects removal of AI Tutor tab
tasks.expectedResult: AI Tutor tab is fully removed from UI navigation and routing

outputPlan.description: Remove AI Tutor tab route entry
Remove AI Tutor tab menu item

metadata.inputContext: Existing UI navigation and routing configuration including AI Tutor tab
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Completes removal of AI Tutor tab from UI and routing

tasks.title: Integrate AI Tutor chat popup input with chat message state and submission logic
tasks.description: In src/components/aiTutor/ChatPopup.tsx, implement the logic to update the chat message state when the user submits a message via the new input field. Connect the input submission to the existing chat message handling system, ensuring messages are added to the chat history and any necessary side effects (e.g., sending to backend or AI service) are triggered.
acceptanceCriteria: User submitted messages update chat message state
Chat history displays new user messages immediately
No errors or crashes on message submission
tasks.expectedResult: Chat popup input is fully functional and integrated with chat message state

outputPlan.description: Add message submission handler and state update logic

metadata.inputContext: ChatPopup component with input field added
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables chat popup input to send messages and update chat state

tasks.title: Update apps/extension/popup.html to ensure chat popup input is rendered
tasks.description: Verify and modify apps/extension/popup.html and its entry point src/popup/main.tsx if needed to ensure the AI Tutor chat popup with input field is rendered correctly in the extension popup UI. Add any necessary container divs or root elements for the chat popup input component.
acceptanceCriteria: Popup HTML includes root div for chat popup input
Chat popup input renders correctly in extension popup
No UI rendering errors in popup
tasks.expectedResult: Extension popup renders AI Tutor chat popup input correctly

outputPlan.description: Ensure root div and script entry for chat popup input
Render ChatPopup component with input in popup

metadata.inputContext: Extension popup HTML and main entry point
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures chat popup input is rendered in extension popup UI

tasks.title: Test and validate removal of AI Tutor tab and addition of chat popup input
tasks.description: Run all unit and integration tests to validate that the AI Tutor tab is removed from navigation and UI, and that the AI Tutor chat popup input is fully functional without regressions. Manually verify the chat popup input UI and message submission behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: No UI regressions in navigation or chat popup
Chat popup input works as expected
tasks.expectedResult: Code changes are verified by tests and manual UI check

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Validates the removal of AI Tutor tab and addition of chat popup input
